title: Add CSP to put_secure_browser_headers
prompt:
The router pipeline below calls `put_secure_browser_headers` without specifying a Content-Security-Policy, so Phoenix's default only sets X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and XSS-Protection — not CSP:

```elixir
pipeline :browser do
  plug :accepts, ["html"]
  plug :fetch_session
  plug :put_secure_browser_headers
end
```

Add an explicit CSP header via the map argument: `%{"content-security-policy" => "default-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'"}`. Also add `strict-transport-security` with a 1-year max-age. Write the corrected router to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical middleware fix — add CSP + HSTS to put_secure_browser_headers.
